passiveAbilities.name: Squire
passiveAbilities.description: Other friendly Soldiers within 4” get +1 Melee stat. Friendly Nobles within 4” get +2 Melee stat.

passiveAbilities.name: Leather Jerkin
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce Slicing and Piercing Dmg suffered by -1.

activeAbilities.name: My Hero
activeAbilities.description: Target Soldier gains 1 energy or, target Noble gains 2 energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Field Medic
arcaneAbilities.description:
[B]X: target Soldier or Noble restores X Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: You’ll Regret That
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this model is not slain, swap the positions of this model and a friendly model within 4”.
